subcodes.first_line: O thou sorrowful captive! Be thou neither dismayed nor distressed; sit not withered in despondency, neither be thou weighed down with grief, for the prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مسجون محزون آشفته مباش و آزرده مگرد پژمرده منشین و افسرده مباش زیرا زندان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
